name: Dust Courser
description: A lean prairie quadruped built for the long run, kicking up dust trails across the frontier flats. Pack hunters that test a traveler's nerve before committing.
starting_behavior: Fast pack hunter, circles prey before striking, breaks off if outnumbered

name: Rail Vulture
description: A broad-winged carrion bird that roosts on the old rail gantries, patient and pitiless, drawn to fresh kills and standing fights alike.
starting_behavior: Circles overhead, dives only on the wounded

name: Thunder Brahmin
description: A heavy horned draft beast of the frontier herds, placid until provoked, then a charging wall of muscle that scatters anything in the corral.
starting_behavior: Grazes peacefully, charges when its herd is threatened
